basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Laboratory Technician, Field worker and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh)
basic_details.post_name: Laboratory Technician, Field worker and More
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh) CRC/ Project Technical Support-III, Laboratory Technician, Field Worker/ Project Technical Support-I Notification 2026 has been released on 22 May 2026 on the official website AIIMS Rishikesh. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Rishikesh CRC/ Project Technical Support-III, Laboratory Technician, Field Worker/ Project Technical Support-I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Upper age limit may be relaxed up to 5 years in the case of candidates belonging to SC/ ST/ OBC/ Women/ Differently abled candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Three Years Graduate , BMLT/DMLT OR MSW
qualification.details: CRC/ Project Technical Support-III: Three Years Graduate in relevant subject/field + three years' experience OR PG in relevant subject/field. Laboratory Technician: 12th in Science + BMLT/DMLT + Two Years' Experience in relevant subject/field. Field worker/ Project Technical Support-I: 12th + Two years' experience in relevant subject/field OR Master's Degree in Social Work (MSW) OR Three Years Graduate in relevant subject/field.

salary_details.details: CRC/ Project Technical Support-III: Rs. 25,000/- per month Laboratory Technician: Rs. 20,000/- per month Field worker/ Project Technical Support-I: Rs. 17,200/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Rishikesh Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 28-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the AIIMS Rishikesh recruitment is 28th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the posts of CRC/Project Technical Support-III, Laboratory Technician, and Field Worker/Project Technical Support-I.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for AIIMS Rishikesh jobs?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. Are there any age relaxations for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, the upper age limit can be relaxed by up to 5 years for candidates belonging to SC/ST, OBC, Women, and Differently-abled categories.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: Qualifications vary per post, ranging from 12th pass with experience to Graduate and Post-Graduate degrees in relevant fields.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for these positions?
faq.answer: The monthly salary ranges from Rs. 17,200/- to Rs. 25,000/- depending on the post.

faq.question: Q8. How can candidates apply for these positions?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply by sending their complete application via email before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for AIIMS Rishikesh recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Written Exam followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where is AIIMS Rishikesh located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Rishikesh is located in Rishikesh, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 249203.
